description: 実録画派生: 新規プロジェクト作成の画面収録抜粋に、macOS sayで作成したナレーション音声を重ねた評価ケース
source: real-app-workflow-01 の 00:06-00:51 を切り出し、macOS say の英語ナレーションを重畳。画面内容は実録画、音声は合成ナレーション。
regenerate_command: mkdir -p eval/dataset/real-app-workflow-05-narrated-create-project tmp && say -o tmp/real-app-workflow-05-narration.aiff "Create a new project. Enter the title. Choose the video file. Wait for the upload to complete. Then create the project." && ffmpeg -y -ss 6 -t 45 -i eval/dataset/real-app-workflow-01/video.mp4 -i tmp/real-app-workflow-05-narration.aiff -filter_complex "[1:a]apad=pad_dur=45[a]" -map 0:v:0 -map "[a]" -t 45 -c:v libx264 -preset veryfast -crf 23 -c:a aac eval/dataset/real-app-workflow-05-narrated-create-project/video.mp4
